Earth_Orbit.name: Earth_Orbit
Earth_Orbit.description: The place players start, floating just above the blue marble.

Earth_Orbital_Station_Zero.name: Earth_Orbital_Station_Zero
Earth_Orbital_Station_Zero.description: The orbital Station above earth, a full ring around the earth.

Earth_Ground_Station_Zero.name: Earth_Ground_Station_Zero
Earth_Ground_Station_Zero.description: The planetary headquarters of ORION, located at the equator. A sprawling complex of hangars and trading posts.

Moon_Orbit.name: Moon_Orbit
Moon_Orbit.description: Earth's Moon looms large. Ancient landing sites are visible on the surface below.

Moon_Ground_Station.name: Moon_Ground_Station
Moon_Ground_Station.description: Humanity's first extraterrestrial colony. Now a museum and trading post for historical artifacts.

Sun_Orbit.name: Sun_Orbit
Sun_Orbit.description: The heart of the Sol System. Extreme heat and radiation make this a challenging navigation point.

SOL_Warp_Gates.name: SOL_Warp_Gates
SOL_Warp_Gates.description: Massive warp gate structures that connect the Sol System to distant star systems. Heavily guarded and monitored.

Mercury_Orbit.name: Mercury_Orbit
Mercury_Orbit.description: Close to the sun, Mercury's orbit is searing hot. The planet below is pockmarked with mining operations.

Mercury_Ground_Station.name: Mercury_Ground_Station
Mercury_Ground_Station.description: A heavily shielded facility on Mercury's surface, specializing in heat-resistant components and bounty hunting operations.

Venus_Orbit.name: Venus_Orbit
Venus_Orbit.description: Venus hangs below, a toxic planet shrouded in acidic clouds. The orbital station is a hub for black market activity.

Venus_Ground_Station.name: Venus_Ground_Station
Venus_Ground_Station.description: A fortified dome facility on Venus's surface. Known for illicit dealings and untraceable goods.

Venus_Orbital_Station.name: Venus_Orbital_Station
Venus_Orbital_Station.description: An aging orbital platform with questionable security. Traders and smugglers frequent the docks.

Mars_Orbit.name: Mars_Orbit
Mars_Orbit.description: The red planet below is dotted with terraforming projects. Mars Orbit serves as a major military and trade hub.

Mars_Ground_Station.name: Mars_Ground_Station
Mars_Ground_Station.description: Built into the Martian surface, this station is a center for colonial operations and ship manufacturing.

Mars_Orbital_Station.name: Mars_Orbital_Station
Mars_Orbital_Station.description: The largest orbital facility around Mars, equipped with advanced shipyards and defensive systems.

Mars_Moon_1_Ground_Station.name: Mars_Moon_1_Ground_Station
Mars_Moon_1_Ground_Station.description: Phobos Station - A weapons depot built into the moon's interior. Heavily armed and fortified.

Mars_Moon_2_Ground_Station.name: Mars_Moon_2_Ground_Station
Mars_Moon_2_Ground_Station.description: Deimos Station - A secretive research facility specializing in stealth technology and cloaking devices.

Asteroid_Belt_Region_1.name: Asteroid_Belt_Region_1
Asteroid_Belt_Region_1.description: The inner belt region, dense with asteroids and mining operations. ORION patrols are frequent but not constant.

ABR1_Resource_1.name: ABR1_Resource_1
ABR1_Resource_1.description: A large metallic asteroid rich in precious metals. Mining equipment is scattered across its surface.

ABR1_Resource_2.name: ABR1_Resource_2
ABR1_Resource_2.description: A cluster of smaller asteroids with high concentrations of rare earth elements.

ABR1_Space_Station.name: ABR1_Space_Station
ABR1_Space_Station.description: A small outpost serving miners and traders in the belt. Known for mail delivery contracts.

Asteroid_Belt_Region_2.name: Asteroid_Belt_Region_2
Asteroid_Belt_Region_2.description: The central belt region with the highest density of asteroids. Navigation requires skill and caution.

ABR2_Resource_1.name: ABR2_Resource_1
ABR2_Resource_1.description: A carbonaceous asteroid with valuable organic compounds and water ice deposits.

ABR2_Resource_2.name: ABR2_Resource_2
ABR2_Resource_2.description: A massive iron-nickel asteroid, one of the most profitable mining sites in the belt.

ABR2_Space_Station.name: ABR2_Space_Station
ABR2_Space_Station.description: A fortified station known for weapons trafficking. ORION turns a blind eye in exchange for information.

Asteroid_Belt_Region_3.name: Asteroid_Belt_Region_3
Asteroid_Belt_Region_3.description: The outer belt region, bordering Jupiter's influence. Less dense but still profitable for experienced miners.

ABR3_Resource_1.name: ABR3_Resource_1
ABR3_Resource_1.description: A silicate asteroid with rare mineral deposits, popular with independent prospectors.

ABR3_Resource_2.name: ABR3_Resource_2
ABR3_Resource_2.description: An asteroid field with scattered chunks of high-grade platinum and iridium.

ABR3_Space_Station.name: ABR3_Space_Station
ABR3_Space_Station.description: A research and trading station specializing in shield technology and experimental explosives.

Jupiter_Orbit.name: Jupiter_Orbit
Jupiter_Orbit.description: The massive gas giant dominates the view. Orbital traffic is heavy with gas haulers and research vessels.

Jupiter_Thunder_Station.name: Jupiter_Thunder_Station
Jupiter_Thunder_Station.description: Atmospheric station in Jupiter's storms. A dangerous posting that pays well for gas collection and storm data.

IO_Station_Weapon_Specialist.name: IO_Station_Weapon_Specialist
IO_Station_Weapon_Specialist.description: Built on Jupiter's volcanic moon Io. The intense geothermal activity powers the Sol System's premier weapons research and manufacturing facility.

Ganymede_Station_Shipwright.name: Ganymede_Station_Shipwright
Ganymede_Station_Shipwright.description: The largest moon in the solar system hosts extensive shipyards and hull modification facilities.

Europa_Station_Engine_Specialist.name: Europa_Station_Engine_Specialist
Europa_Station_Engine_Specialist.description: Deep beneath Europa's ice sheets, this facility specializes in engine and propulsion system upgrades.

Callisto_Station_Shield_Specialist.name: Callisto_Station_Shield_Specialist
Callisto_Station_Shield_Specialist.description: Far from Jupiter's radiation, Callisto Station is renowned for shield generator research and upgrades.

Amalthea_Station_Cargo_Specialist.name: Amalthea_Station_Cargo_Specialist
Amalthea_Station_Cargo_Specialist.description: A logistics hub specializing in cargo hold expansion and storage optimization systems.

Himalia_Station_Sensor_Specialist.name: Himalia_Station_Sensor_Specialist
Himalia_Station_Sensor_Specialist.description: An outer moon facility dedicated to sensor arrays, scanning technology, and long-range detection systems.

Thebe_Station_Stealth_Specialist.name: Thebe_Station_Stealth_Specialist
Thebe_Station_Stealth_Specialist.description: A secretive facility specializing in stealth cloaking technology and signature dampening systems.

Saturn_Orbit.name: Saturn_Orbit
Saturn_Orbit.description: Saturn's rings create a spectacular backdrop. The orbit is a hub for ring mining and research operations.

Saturn_Ring_Resource_1.name: Saturn_Ring_Resource_1
Saturn_Ring_Resource_1.description: Ice and rock particles suspended in Saturn's rings. Harvesting requires specialized equipment.

Saturn_Ring_Resource_2.name: Saturn_Ring_Resource_2
Saturn_Ring_Resource_2.description: A denser section of the rings with higher concentrations of metallic particles.

Saturn_Ring_Station_1.name: Saturn_Ring_Station_1
Saturn_Ring_Station_1.description: A research station embedded in the ring system. Focuses on data collection and ship modifications.

Saturn_Ring_Station_2.name: Saturn_Ring_Station_2
Saturn_Ring_Station_2.description: Sister station to Ring Station 1. Offers similar services with a focus on long-range scanning equipment.

Titan_Station_Elite_Outfitter.name: Titan_Station_Elite_Outfitter
Titan_Station_Elite_Outfitter.description: Saturn's largest moon hosts the most prestigious ship outfitting facility in the outer system. Only the finest equipment.

Enceladus_Station_Rare_Materials_Trading.name: Enceladus_Station_Rare_Materials_Trading
Enceladus_Station_Rare_Materials_Trading.description: Built above the geysers of Enceladus, this station is the premier exchange for rare materials and exotic compounds.

Rhea_Station_Advanced_Manufacturing.name: Rhea_Station_Advanced_Manufacturing
Rhea_Station_Advanced_Manufacturing.description: A cutting-edge fabrication facility producing top-tier ship components and experimental technology.

Uranus_Orbit.name: Uranus_Orbit
Uranus_Orbit.description: The ice giant rotates on its side, creating unique atmospheric phenomena. A remote but profitable posting.

Uranus_Atmo_Station.name: Uranus_Atmo_Station
Uranus_Atmo_Station.description: An atmospheric processing station harvesting rare gases from Uranus's atmosphere.

Titania_Station_Data_Archive.name: Titania_Station_Data_Archive
Titania_Station_Data_Archive.description: A massive data archive seeking information from every corner of the Sol System. Pays well for scan data, research, and discoveries.

Oberon_Station_Sample_Repository.name: Oberon_Station_Sample_Repository
Oberon_Station_Sample_Repository.description: A scientific facility collecting physical samples from across Sol. Seeks minerals, gases, ice, and organic materials.

Neptune_Orbit.name: Neptune_Orbit
Neptune_Orbit.description: The furthest major planet from the sun. Neptune Orbit serves as the gateway to the Kuiper Belt.

Neptune_Orbital_Station.name: Neptune_Orbital_Station
Neptune_Orbital_Station.description: The last major outpost before the Kuiper Belt. A waystation for explorers and prospectors heading into the outer system.

Triton_Station_Cartography_Center.name: Triton_Station_Cartography_Center
Triton_Station_Cartography_Center.description: The Sol System's premier mapping facility. Purchases navigation data, system charts, and location discoveries from across all regions.

Nereid_Station_Frontier_Research.name: Nereid_Station_Frontier_Research
Nereid_Station_Frontier_Research.description: An isolated research outpost seeking materials and data from the most remote locations in Sol. The further out, the better they pay.

Kuiper_Region_1.name: Kuiper_Region_1
Kuiper_Region_1.description: The inner edge of the Kuiper Belt. Icy bodies drift in the darkness, rich with rare materials.

KR1_Resource_1.name: KR1_Resource_1
KR1_Resource_1.description: A frozen dwarf planet with exposed ice deposits. Rich in rare volatiles.

KR1_Resource_2.name: KR1_Resource_2
KR1_Resource_2.description: A cluster of icy cometary bodies with pristine samples from the early solar system.

KR1_Resource_3.name: KR1_Resource_3
KR1_Resource_3.description: A large trans-Neptunian object with subsurface water ice and organic compounds.

KR1_Resource_4.name: KR1_Resource_4
KR1_Resource_4.description: An isolated ice field far from patrol routes. High risk, high reward.

Kuiper_Region_1_Station.name: Kuiper_Region_1_Station
Kuiper_Region_1_Station.description: A remote outpost for ice traders and prospectors. The last safe harbor before venturing deeper into the belt.

Kuiper_Region_2.name: Kuiper_Region_2
Kuiper_Region_2.description: Deeper into the Kuiper Belt. ORION patrols are infrequent, and pirate activity increases.

KR2_Resource_1.name: KR2_Resource_1
KR2_Resource_1.description: A binary system of icy planetoids orbiting each other in the void.

KR2_Resource_2.name: KR2_Resource_2
KR2_Resource_2.description: A shattered comet with exposed interior materials. Extremely valuable for research.

KR2_Resource_3.name: KR2_Resource_3
KR2_Resource_3.description: A rogue planetoid that drifted into the Kuiper Belt from elsewhere in the galaxy.

KR2_Resource_4.name: KR2_Resource_4
KR2_Resource_4.description: An ice field rich with deuterium and tritium. Perfect for fusion fuel production.

Kuiper_Region_2_Station.name: Kuiper_Region_2_Station
Kuiper_Region_2_Station.description: A barely-maintained outpost run by independent operators. ORION presence is minimal.

Kuiper_Region_3.name: Kuiper_Region_3
Kuiper_Region_3.description: Far beyond Neptune's influence. This region is lawless and dangerous.

KR3_Resource_1.name: KR3_Resource_1
KR3_Resource_1.description: A field of ancient ice fragments from the formation of the solar system.

KR3_Resource_2.name: KR3_Resource_2
KR3_Resource_2.description: A massive ice moon ejected from Neptune's orbit eons ago.

KR3_Resource_3.name: KR3_Resource_3
KR3_Resource_3.description: A debris field from a shattered dwarf planet. Rich in metallic ices.

KR3_Resource_4.name: KR3_Resource_4
KR3_Resource_4.description: An uncharted ice field discovered by prospectors. Potentially the richest deposit in the belt.

Kuiper_Region_3_Station.name: Kuiper_Region_3_Station
Kuiper_Region_3_Station.description: A pirate haven disguised as a legitimate trading post. ORION has no authority here.

Kuiper_Region_4.name: Kuiper_Region_4
Kuiper_Region_4.description: The outermost reaches of the Kuiper Belt, bordering the Oort Cloud. No patrols, no laws.

KR4_Resource_1.name: KR4_Resource_1
KR4_Resource_1.description: A lonely ice dwarf at the edge of the solar system. Few dare to venture this far.

KR4_Resource_2.name: KR4_Resource_2
KR4_Resource_2.description: A field of proto-comets waiting to fall toward the sun. Millions of years of potential.

KR4_Resource_3.name: KR4_Resource_3
KR4_Resource_3.description: An anomalous ice formation that defies conventional physics. Origin unknown.

KR4_Resource_4.name: KR4_Resource_4
KR4_Resource_4.description: The furthest confirmed resource point in the Sol System. Only the bravest or most desperate come here.

Kuiper_Region_4_Station.name: Kuiper_Region_4_Station
Kuiper_Region_4_Station.description: A mysterious station at the edge of known space. Rumors say it's run by exiles and outcasts.
